title: RVT.BSP.001.CURRENT_SCORE_RECOMPUTED — Current behavioural score recomputed
description: Runtime contract for the resource event published by CAP.BSP.001.SCO whenever the behavioural score of a beneficiary is recomputed after a transaction or a significant behavioural signal. Every payload published on the operational RabbitMQ topic exchange owned by CAP.BSP.001.SCO with routing key EVT.BSP.001.SCORE_RECOMPUTED.RVT.BSP.001.CURRENT_SCORE_RECOMPUTED MUST validate against this schema (ADR-TECH-STRAT-001 Rules 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6). The payload is a domain event DDD: it carries the data of the score-recalculation aggregate transition — coherent and atomic — not a snapshot of the read model RES.BSP.001.CURRENT_SCORE, and not a technical patch of fields. Beneficiary identity resolution toward OBJ.REF.001.BENEFICIARY_RECORD.internal_id is performed by consumers via CAP.REF.001.BEN lookup using the case_id correlation key carried by this payload (the producer never carries the canonical identifier).

evaluation_id.description: Unique identifier of this evaluation (UUID or business code). Mirrors RES.BSP.001.CURRENT_SCORE.evaluation_id and OBJ.BSP.001.EVALUATION.evaluation_id.

case_id.description: CORRELATION KEY. Reference to the relevant participation case (Reliever case ID). Mirrors RES.BSP.001.CURRENT_SCORE.case_id and OBJ.BSP.001.EVALUATION.case_id. Identity resolution: consumers resolve case_id toward OBJ.REF.001.BENEFICIARY_RECORD.internal_id via a CAP.REF.001.BEN (Beneficiary Reference) lookup. The producer (CAP.BSP.001.SCO) NEVER carries the canonical internal_id.

score_value.description: Numeric value of the behavioural score AFTER recomputation (transition target value). Mirrors RES.BSP.001.CURRENT_SCORE.score_value and OBJ.BSP.001.EVALUATION.score_value.

delta_score.description: Score variation compared to the previous evaluation (transition delta). Domain event DDD field — captures the magnitude of the transition. Mirrors RES.BSP.001.CURRENT_SCORE.delta_score.

poids.description: Weight applied to this factor in the score recomputation (signed; positive = upward contribution, negative = downward).

valeur.description: Optional measured value of the factor at recomputation time.

contributing_factors.description: Factors that contributed to this recomputation, with their type and weight. Mirrors RES.BSP.001.CURRENT_SCORE.contributing_factors and OBJ.BSP.001.EVALUATION.contributing_factors.

evaluation_type.description: Evaluation type — INITIAL (enrolment baseline) or CURRENT (post-transaction recomputation). Mirrors OBJ.BSP.001.EVALUATION.evaluation_type.

evenement_declencheur.description: Identifier of the transaction or behavioural signal that triggered the recomputation. Mirrors RES.BSP.001.CURRENT_SCORE.evenement_declencheur. Carries the causal link of the domain event DDD.

computation_timestamp.description: Recomputation timestamp (ISO-8601, UTC recommended). Mirrors OBJ.BSP.001.EVALUATION.computation_timestamp and RES.BSP.001.CURRENT_SCORE.computation_timestamp.

model_version.description: Version of the scoring model used for this recomputation (e.g. SemVer or model-registry tag). Mirrors OBJ.BSP.001.EVALUATION.model_version and RES.BSP.001.CURRENT_SCORE.model_version.
